title: OREGON MOTHERSCARE - 211info
text: GILLIAM COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH OREGON MOTHERSCARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps pregnant people get connected to prenatal care and other resources in their communities. Services include health insurance navigation, such as OHP application assistance, prenatal care appointment scheduling, health education, and community referrals. Referrals can be provided for WIC, dental care, home visiting programs, and other prenatal support services. 422 N Main Street Condon, OR 97823 Eligibility: Pregnant people Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-noon Email (541) 626-7088 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 626-7088 Oregon Motherscare Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Gilliam County Services: Dental Care Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Navigator Programs * Pregnant Individuals Physician Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Pregnancy Testing Specialized Information and Referral * Pregnant Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH SERVICES SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GILLIAM COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
